summary: The most likely cause of chronic diarrhea in an HIV-positive individual showing 10–30 μm cysts with positive Kinyoun stain is **Cystoisospora belli**, because these characteristics align perfectly with its diagnostic features—size, staining pattern—and common occurrence in severely immunocompromised patients like those with untreated or poorly controlled HIV.
formatted_summary: agent1 (Round 1 summarized): The most likely cause of chronic diarrhea in an HIV-positive individual showing 10–30 μm cysts with positive Kinyoun stain is **Cystoisospora belli**, because these characteristics align perfectly with its diagnostic features—size, staining pattern—and common occurrence in severely immunocompromised patients like those with untreated or poorly controlled HIV.. Answer choice: A
